originalTitle: These 4 market sectors look frothy — and Nvidia’s isn’t even the biggest bubble
summary: S&P 500 has a 30% chance of crashing over the next two years. That’s the good news.
content: S&P 500 has a 30% chance of crashing over the next two years. That’s the good news.

chineseSummary: 标准普尔 500 指数未来两年崩盘的可能性为 30%。这是个好消息。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
